---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or capability
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem It Solves

What user problem does this address? Who specifically experiences this problem?

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work? Be specific about user interactions.

## Product Alignment

Does this fit Pocketa's mission: helping unstable-income earners understand what is safe to spend?

Reference [docs/core/POCKETA_BRAIN.md](../../docs/core/POCKETA_BRAIN.md) if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered and why this one is preferred.

## Out-of-Scope Flags

Is this in scope for the current phase? Check [docs/core/ROADMAP.md](../../docs/core/ROADMAP.md).

## Checklist

- [ ] This aligns with Pocketa's product identity (not a general finance app feature)
- [ ] I have read the roadmap and this is not already planned or rejected
- [ ] This does not require a backend/cloud service (MVP is offline-first)
